info.title: Chr.Avro.Cli
info.description: A tool for working with Avro from the command line

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create an Avro schema for a .NET type.

options.name: --assembly
options.description:
The name of or path to an assembly to load (multiple
space-separated values accepted).

options.name: --enum-behavior
options.description:
The type of schema that enum types should be
represented by. Options are "symbolic" (generate an
"enum" schema; the default behavior), "integral"
(generate an "int" or "long" schema based on the
underlying type; the behavior for all flag enums),
and "nominal" (generate a "string" schema).

options.name: --nullable-references
options.description:
(Default: Annotated) Which reference types should be
represented with nullable union schemas. Options are
"annotated" (use nullable annotations if available;
the default behavior), "none", and "all".

options.name: --temporal-behavior
options.description:
Whether timestamps should be represented with
"string" schemas (ISO 8601) or "long" schemas
(timestamp logical types). Options are "iso8601",
"epochmilliseconds", and "epochmicroseconds".

options.name: --type
options.description: The type to build a schema for.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Generate C# code for a schema from the Schema Registry or
stdin.

options.name: --registry-config
options.description:
Configuration options to provide to the
registry client (multiple space-separated
key=value pairs accepted).

options.name: --registry-url
options.description: The URL of the schema registry.

options.name: --id
options.description:
If a subject/version is not specified, the ID
of the schema.

options.name: --subject
options.description:
If an ID is not specified, the subject of the
schema.

options.name: --component-model-annotations
options.description:
Whether to emit component model annotations
for record and enum descriptions.

options.name: --nullable-references
options.description:
Whether reference types selected for nullable
record fields should be annotated as
nullable.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: registry-get
commands.description: Retrieve a schema from the Schema Registry.

options.name: --registry-config
options.description:
Configuration options to provide to the registry
client (multiple space-separated key=value pairs
accepted).

options.name: --registry-url
options.description: The URL of the schema registry.

options.name: --id
options.description:
If a subject/version is not specified, the
ID of the schema.

options.name: --subject
options.description:
If an ID is not specified, the subject of
the schema.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

commands.name: registry-test
commands.description:
Verify that a .NET type is compatible with a schema in the
Schema Registry.

options.name: --assembly
options.description:
The name of or path to an assembly to load (multiple
space-separated values accepted).

options.name: --type
options.description: The type to test.

options.name: --registry-config
options.description:
Configuration options to provide to the registry
client (multiple space-separated key=value pairs
accepted).

options.name: --registry-url
options.description: The URL of the schema registry.

options.name: --id
options.description:
If a subject/version is not specified, the
ID of the target schema.

options.name: --subject
options.description:
If an ID is not specified, the subject of
the target schema.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.
